description_long: This is a large, cylindrical black barrel with a prominent yellow warning label on its side, reading 'WARNING! BIOHAZARD' and featuring a biohazard symbol. The barrel is constructed from metal and has two horizontal reinforcing bands around its circumference. Bright green liquid is visibly spilled and pooled on the top surface, with some of it dripping down the side, suggesting a hazardous or toxic substance inside. The top of the barrel features a circular cap or bung, also stained with the green liquid. The surface of the barrel is mostly smooth but shows some subtle wear and grime, giving it a slightly used appearance.
description: A large black metal barrel with a yellow biohazard warning label and green toxic liquid spilled on top and down the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow 'WARNING! BIOHAZARD' label and a small pool of green liquid on the top edge.
description_view_1: Side view with a prominent streak of green liquid running down from the top, partially obscuring the label.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal markings, showing the green liquid pooled near the cap but no label visible.
description_view_3: Back view with the green liquid pooled around the cap on top, no label or streaks visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Yellow label with black text 'WARNING! BIOHAZARD' and a biohazard symbol, placed on the side of the barrel.
